hero.title: Ukuhlonipha
hero.tagline: Ukweseka Nokufeza Imfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu e-Afrika
hero.description: I-New Education Standard Award Africa ({{edition}}) ibungaza abaholi abanombono, izikhungo nabanobuhlakani abakha ikusasa lemfundo kulo lonke i-Afrika.

watchLive.title: Bheka Bukhoma
watchLive.description: I-NESA Afrika TV isakaza kumaphephandaba okuxhumana nomphakathi, iziteshi zamakhambi ne-app ye-CAST TV.

quote.text: {{editionName}} akuyona imicimbi. Yinqubo yokubalisa kwezemfundo esekelwe emazingeni exhuma:
quote.footer: Kulethwa ngokubusa, ukusebenza obala nokufaneleka kwezwekazi.

trophyHero.headline: Ukuqaphela Ubuhle Ku-
trophyHero.valueProposition: Inkundla yokuqaphela yezwekazi esekelwe emazingeni, ebungaza futhi ihloniphe abashintshi abaqhuba "Imfundo Yawo Wonke" e-Afrika, eqaphela umthelela oqinisekisiwe, futhi ivumela ukubamba iqhaza komphakathi okuhlelekile kulo lonke izwekazi.

howItWorksVisual.title: Indlela i-NESA-Afrika Esebenza Ngayo
howItWorksVisual.description: Kusuka ekuqapheleni kuya emtheleleni ohlala njalo — isinyathelo ngasinye sibalulekile.
howItWorksVisual.agcNote: Ukubamba iqhaza kuvula amaphuzu okuvota. Ukuvota kusebenzisa i-AGC ngesikhathi samawindi asemthethweni.

voteWithAGC.title: Ukubamba Iqhaza kwe-Afrigold
voteWithAGC.description: Ukubamba kwakho iqhaza kukuzuzela ama-Afrigold Credits (AGCc) — amakhredithi okubamba iqhaza okuhlelekile.
voteWithAGC.earnDesc: Ukubamba kwakho iqhaza kuvula amaphuzu okuvota we-AGC.
voteWithAGC.voteDesc: Sebenzisa i-AGC yakho ngesikhathi samawindi asemthethweni.
voteWithAGC.impactDesc: Abaphumeleli bayamenyezelwa futhi izimali ziya emiphakathini.
voteWithAGC.conversionNote: 10 AGCc = 1 AGC — AGCc iguquka ngokuzenzela. 1 Ivoti = 1 AGC.
voteWithAGC.blueGarnetPoint: I-Blue Garnet: Isisindo esixubile sabahluleleli nomphakathi
voteWithAGC.disclaimer: I-AGC ayithengiselwani — akukho ukukhipha, akukho ukukhokha. I-AGC ayiyona i-crypto.

integrity.title: Izivikelo Nokusebenza Obala
integrity.description: Izilawuli zokwethembeka ezisekelwe ebuhleni zivikela isinyathelo ngasinye.
integrity.goldDesc: Ukubamba iqhaza komphakathi kuphela. Ukuhlolwa okusobala.
integrity.agcDisclaimer: I-AGC ayithengiselwani — akukho ukukhipha noma ukukhokha.

legacyImpact.badge: Ifa Emva Komklomelo • Umthelela Womphakathi we-SCEF
legacyImpact.title: Yakha Kabusha Isikole Sami
legacyImpact.description: Isikole esisodwa sezidingo ezikhethekile ngesikhathi esisodwa — siqokwe umphakathi, sikhethwe ngokuvota, siguqulwe yi-EduAid-Africa.
legacyImpact.cta: Hlola Yakha Kabusha Isikole Sami e-Afrika
legacyImpact.attribution: Umqondo wefa emva komklomelo we-Santos Creations Educational Foundation

nominationPaths.title: Qala Uhambo Lwakho Lokuqoka
nominationPaths.description: Khetha isigaba semiklomelo esifanele ngokwempumelelo yoqokiwe.

meta.title: Mayelana ne-NESA-Afrika | I-New Education Standard Award Africa
meta.description: I-NESA-Afrika yinkundla yokubalisa kwezemfundo eqaphela abashintshi abakha ikusasa lemfundo e-Afrika.

hero.title: Mayelana
hero.description: I-New Education Standard Award Africa akuyona iwebhusayithi yemiklomelo. Yinkundla yokubalisa kwezemfundo ebungaza amaqhawe emfundo ase-Afrika.

missionSection.title: Inhloso Yethu
missionSection.description: Ukuqaphela, ukuqinisekisa nokubungaza abantu nezikhungo eziqhuba Imfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu kulo lonke i-Afrika.

recognition.title: Ukwamukelwa
recognition.description: Ukubungaza amaqhawe emfundo ase-Afrika ngemiklomelo esekelwe ebunyeni.

accountability.title: Ukubalisa
accountability.description: Izivikelo zokubusa ziqinisekisa inkululeko yabasekeli nobuqotho bokuvota.

continentalReach.title: Ukufinyelela Kwezwekazi
continentalReach.description: Indlela yesifunda-kuqala ehlanganisa zonke izifunda eziyi-5 zase-Afrika kanye ne-Diaspora.

impact.title: Umthelela
impact.description: Ukuqhuba Imfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu ngokubonakala nokuqinisekisa.

awardTiers.title: Amazinga Emiklomelo
awardTiers.description: Izinkundla ezine ezihlukile zokwamukelwa ezinezinqubo eziyingqayizivele.

platinum.title: Isitifiketi se-Platinum
platinum.description: Ukwamukelwa kwisisekelo ngomnikelo Wemfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu. Akukho ukuncintisana, kuqinisekiswe yi-NRC.

icon.title: I-Afrika Education Icon
icon.description: Ukwamukelwa kwempumelelo yempilo. Izigabana ezi-3 e-Afrika, e-Diaspora naBangani Base-Afrika.

blueGarnet.title: Umklomelo we-Blue Garnet
blueGarnet.description: Udumo oluphezulu — 60% abahluleleli, 40% ukuvota komphakathi. Abaphumeleli abayi-9 ku-Gala.

categories.title: Izigaba Zemiklomelo
categories.description: Hlola izigaba zethu eziyi-17 zemiklomelo eziqaphela ubuhle emkhakheni wezemfundo wase-Afrika

meta.title: Izigaba Zemiklomelo | {{editionName}}
meta.description: Hlola zonke izigaba eziyi-17 ze-NESA-Afrika nezigabana ezingaphezu kuka-138.

hero.title: Izigaba Zemiklomelo Esemthethweni Eziyi-17
hero.description: Ukubungaza ubuhle kwezemfundo, umthwalo womphakathi neteknoloji kulo lonke izwekazi lase-Afrika.

hero.title: Hlangana
hero.description: Thola othisha nezikhungo ezimangalisayo eziguqula imfundo kulo lonke i-Afrika.

hero.title: Vota Amaqhawe
hero.description: Ivoti lakho lisiza ukuqaphela labo abaguqula imfundo kulo lonke izwekazi.

cta.title: Uyamazi Othile Owenza Umehluko?
cta.description: Ukuqokwa yisinyathelo sokuqala sokuqaphela amaqhawe emfundo.

meta.title: Xhumana ne-NESA-Afrika
meta.description: Imibuzo mayelana nokuqokwa noma ubudlelwano? Silapha ukusiza.

hero.title: Xhumana
hero.description: Imibuzo mayelana nokuqokwa noma ubudlelwano? Silapha ukusiza.

phone.title: Shayela Thina
phone.description: NgoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesihlanu, 9 ekuseni - 5 ntambama WAT

login.title: Siyakwamukela Futhi
login.subtitle: Ngena ukuze uqhubeke nokubungaza ubuhle base-Afrika

register.title: Joyina i-NESA Afrika
register.subtitle: Yenza i-akhawunti yakho ukuqoka, ukuvota nokubungaza ubuhle base-Afrika
register.successMessage: I-akhawunti idaliwe ngempumelelo! Siyakwamukela ku-NESA Afrika.

nominationPaths.title: Qala Uhambo Lwakho Lokuqoka
nominationPaths.description: Khetha isigaba semiklomelo esifanele ngokususelwa ekuphumeleleni koqokiwe.

ediIntegrity.title: Udonga Lobuqotho lwe-EDI
ediIntegrity.description: Isinyathelo ngasinye senqubo yemiklomelo ye-NESA-Africa silawulwa yi-Education Development Index — kusukela ekuqokelweni kuya ekuvoteni kokugcina.

ediMatrix.title: I-EDI Matrix
ediMatrix.subtitle: Isisekelo Sobuqotho
ediMatrix.description: I-Education Development Index ichaza amazinga okuhlola emazingeni angu-3 nezigaba eziyi-17.

nomination.title: Ukuqokwa
nomination.subtitle: Kwabaqoki
nomination.description: Imihlahlandlela yokuqoka enobulungiswa, ukukhetha isigaba nezidingo zokuthunyelwa.

acceptance.title: Ukwamukelwa
acceptance.subtitle: Kwabaqokiwe
acceptance.description: Inqubo yokuhlolwa kwe-NRC, uhambo lokwamukelwa nokulandelela isimo.

judges.title: Ithimba Labajaji
judges.subtitle: Kwabajaji
judges.description: Izimiso ezinesisindo samaphuzu angu-20, ama-COI protocols nokuhlola okuzimele.

voting.title: Ukuvota Komphakathi
voting.subtitle: Kwabavoti
voting.description: Amaphuzu okubamba iqhaza e-AGC, izikhathi zokuvota zeGolide ne-Blue Garnet.

watchSection.title: Bukela & Hlala Ubambe Iqhaza
watchSection.description: Bukela imibukiso esemthethweni ukuze uhlale unolwazi futhi ubambe iqhaza emzungezweni wemiklomelo.

judgesSection.title: Hlangana Nabahle
judgesSection.description: Ku-NESA-Africa, ithimba lethu labajaji lihlanganisa abaholi bezemfundo, abakha izinto ezintsha, abanikeli nabochwepheshe.

mediaShowcase.title: Bukela, Lalela
mediaShowcase.description: Hlala uxhumekile ngemidiya esemthethweni, ukusakazwa bukhoma nomculo we-NESA Africa.

championsDirectory.title: Ukubungaza
championsDirectory.description: Thola othisha, abakhi bezinto ezintsha nezikhungo ezimangalisayo eziguqula imfundo e-Afrika.

musicSection.title: Izingoma ze-NESA Africa
musicSection.description: Lalela izingoma zethu ezisemthethweni ezibungaza imfundo e-Afrika.
musicSection.everyDownloadHelps: Ukulanda ngakunye kusiza ukwakha kabusha izikole nokuhlinzeka izinsiza zemfundo e-Afrika.

footer.tagline: Ukubungaza Amaqhawe Emfundo e-Afrika kusukela ngo-2010
